message:
chore: update support_matrix.json with 6 new Implemented symbols

Reflects the atoll, secure_getenv, strtoimax, strtoll, strtoull, and
strtoumax implementations added in the previous commit. Total exported
symbols increases from 255 to 261 and Implemented count rises from
152 to 158, all classified as coldpath stdlib_abi entries with hardened
membrane repair clamping semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
